# Instructions

## 1. install gitfolio
```bash
npm install -g gitfolio
```

## 2. run gitfolio
```bash
gitfolio ui
```

## 3. open browser
```bash
open http://localhost:3000
```

## 4. Fill out forms

## 5. Click "Build" button

## 6. Move the generated files to the root of your GitHub Pages repository

## 7. Commit and push the changes
